tools.name: quote_agent_route
tools.description: Estimate the cheapest sensible agent execution lane before buying model calls or xpay tools. Returns a budget decision, tool-stack recommendation, and fallback plan. Buy and run for 0.03 USDC on Base at https://payanagent.com/x402/kh732rk76r7nv67q1h5223kc9x8agkfx.

tools.name: generate_public_lead_brief
tools.description: Fetch a public website and return a buyer-fit brief with public signals, agentic offer angles, and next actions. No private contact database is queried. Buy and run for 0.03 USDC on Base at https://payanagent.com/x402/kh7b6yxnq209169aq8wavbqzh98ag9gv.

tools.name: score_defi_token_risk
tools.description: Return a research-only token risk snapshot from public liquidity, volume, pair-age, volatility, and data availability. Does not trade and is not financial advice. Buy and run for 0.01 USDC on Base at https://payanagent.com/x402/kh7eqsawc4t694gf1pxqn5shwn8ah5sw.

tools.name: compare_market_tool_options
tools.description: Compare a task against public xpay catalog options and observed high-demand tool patterns before an agent chains several paid tools. Returns competing tool surfaces, Signal Desk countermoves, moat guidance, unsupported claims, and recommended next paid calls. Buy and run for 0.03 USDC on Base at htt
